caption: A man with a tall, stylized grey wig, glasses, and black headphones sits in a studio setting. He wears a white button-down shirt with a red bow tie and brown suspenders. He is positioned behind a professional microphone with a black pop filter. In the background, a wall is decorated with numerous framed photographs and clothing items, including a "LEE" brand garment. The screen features two logos: "ESTALBIO PODCAST" on the left and "GOSS TALK JOY" on the right. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing with his right hand, which is partially visible as he moves it upward. His facial expression remains focused as he talks into the microphone, with slight shifts in his head position and mouth movement across the frames, indicating an active conversation.
